name: DW · CRM Lead
sql:
SELECT
    gs                                                                          AS lead_id,
    'LEAD-' || lpad(gs::text, 6, '0')                                          AS lead_code,
    (ARRAY['Alice','Bob','Charlie','Diana','Eve','Frank','Grace','Henry','Ivy','Jack'])
        [1 + (('x'||substr(md5('LDFN'||gs::text),1,8))::bit(32)::bigint % 10)]
        || ' ' ||
    (ARRAY['Smith','Jones','Brown','Garcia','Miller','Davis','Lopez','Wilson','Lee','Clark'])
        [1 + (('x'||substr(md5('LDLN'||gs::text),1,8))::bit(32)::bigint % 10)]  AS lead_name,
    'lead' || gs || '@prospect.com'                                             AS email,
    1 + (('x'||substr(md5('LDEMP'||gs::text),1,8))::bit(32)::bigint % 300)      AS owner_employee_id,
    1 + (('x'||substr(md5('LDCMP'||gs::text),1,8))::bit(32)::bigint % 100)      AS campaign_id,
    (ARRAY['Web Form','Cold Call','Event','Referral','Partner','Inbound'])
        [1 + (('x'||substr(md5('LDSRC'||gs::text),1,8))::bit(32)::bigint % 6)]  AS lead_source,
    (ARRAY['New','Contacted','Qualified','Unqualified','Converted'])
        [1 + (('x'||substr(md5('LDSTAT'||gs::text),1,8))::bit(32)::bigint % 5)] AS status,
    (('x'||substr(md5('LDSCORE'||gs::text),1,8))::bit(32)::bigint % 100)        AS lead_score,
    (CURRENT_DATE - (('x'||substr(md5('LDDATE'||gs::text),1,8))::bit(32)::bigint % 730)::int) AS created_date,
    CASE WHEN (('x'||substr(md5('LDSTAT'||gs::text),1,8))::bit(32)::bigint % 5) = 4   -- 'Converted' bucket
         THEN 1 + (('x'||substr(md5('LDCUST'||gs::text),1,8))::bit(32)::bigint % 2000)
         ELSE NULL END                                                          AS converted_customer_id
FROM generate_series(1, 3000) AS gs
